keyPoints: Intent: A request sent by an app to another app to perform a specific action.
Intent Filter: A component that specifies which intents an app can handle.
Activity Life Cycle: The stages an activity goes through, from creation to destruction.
Broadcast Life Cycle: The stages a broadcast goes through, from creation to delivery.
Intent Filter Patterns: Specify the patterns of intents an app can handle, such as ."com.example.action".
Intent Filter Actions: Specify the actions an app can handle, such as "."com.example.action".
Activity Life Cycle Methods: OnCreate, OnStart, OnResume, OnPause, OnStop, OnDestroy.
Broadcast Life Cycle Methods: onReceive, onSend, onCancel, onException, onFinish.
